title: Minecolonies All Biome Crops
description: Allows Minecolonies Food to be grown in every biome.
body:
MineColonies All Biome Crops

Unlock the full potential of your colony! This datapack removes biome restrictions on all MineColonies food crops, allowing your farmers to grow any crop in any environment. Build freely without worrying about where your colony is located — from deserts to tundras, every biome is now fertile ground.


Features:



    All MineColonies crops can now be farmed in any biome.


    Seamless integration with existing colonies and farmer assignments


    Perfect for custom modpacks, skyblock challenges, or just freeing your farmers from the tyranny of nature.

Needs Forge and Minecolonies to function.

Also, I've decided to release mods like this a little bit early on my Patreon for bug testing. There's a free tier and usually everything should be accessible on there!
